_rationale.purpose: Parity proof for DART-MWm23vqgX9O6: `lci grep --exclude PATTERN` (regex path filter) must mirror Go. cmd/lci/main.go:144 — grepCommand reads --exclude and forwards into SearchOptions.ExcludePattern; the result rows are regex-filtered. C++ uses the same apply_path_filters() helper as search, applied before exclude-tests/exclude-comments so all downstream grep modes see the path-narrowed set.
_rationale.implementation: src/cli/search.cpp run_grep — calls apply_path_filters(results_arr, exclude, include) before the exclude_tests/exclude_comments/invert/max-count pipeline.
_rationale.tier: stable: stdout matches Go after text_normalize (sort_lines for grep output ordering).
